version_description: Transposed to D for ease of playing in standard tuning, more accurate chords and structure.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Oh don't you dare look back, Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
I said you're holding back, She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
She said Ooh hoo,  Shut up and dance with me[/tab]

[Link 1]

[ch]G5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]B5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch]
[ch]G5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab]        [ch]G5[/ch]      [ch]A5[/ch]           [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]A5[/ch]
We were victims of the night[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G5[/ch]        [ch]A5[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]
The chemical, physical, kryptonite[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]A5[/ch]           [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]A5[/ch]
Helpless to the bass and the fading light[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G5[/ch]              [ch]A5[/ch]
Oh we were bound to get to-gether,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D/A[/ch]
Bound to get  to- ge-ther[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
She took my arm,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D/A[/ch]
I don't know how it happened.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
We took the floor and she said[/tab]

[Chorus 2]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Oh don't you dare look back, Just keep your eyes on me.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]B5[/ch]     [ch]A5[/ch]
I said you're holding back, She said shut up and dance with me![/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
This woman is my destiny[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
She said Ooh hoo,  Shut up and dance with me[/tab]

[Link 2]

[ch]G5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]B5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch]

[Verse 2]

[tab]           [ch]G5[/ch]             [ch]A5[/ch]              [ch]B5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch]
A backless dress and some beat up sneaks[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G5[/ch]      [ch]A5[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]
My discothèque Juliet, teenage dream[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]A5[/ch]           [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]A5[/ch]
I felt it in my chest as she looked at me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G5[/ch]              [ch]A5[/ch]
I knew we were bound to get to-gether,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D/A[/ch]
Bound to be   to- ge-ther[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
She took my arm,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D/A[/ch]
I don't know how it happened.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
